evaluationCriterias.title: Professional Knowledge
evaluationCriterias.description: Assessment of professional expertise and job-related competence.

evaluationCriterias.title: Further Training (optional)
evaluationCriterias.description: Assessment of participation in further training and personal professional development.

evaluationCriterias.title: Comprehension / Analytical Thinking
evaluationCriterias.description: Ability to quickly understand complex matters and analyze them logically.

evaluationCriterias.title: Commitment to Performance
evaluationCriterias.description: Level of commitment, initiative, and willingness to contribute.

evaluationCriterias.title: Resilience
evaluationCriterias.description: Ability to work reliably under pressure or heavy workload.

evaluationCriterias.title: Working Style
evaluationCriterias.description: Quality of work organization, structure, efficiency, and independence.

evaluationCriterias.title: Reliability / Integrity
evaluationCriterias.description: Reliability, integrity, and adherence to agreements and rules.

evaluationCriterias.title: Work Results
evaluationCriterias.description: Quality, accuracy, and completeness of delivered work results.

evaluationCriterias.title: Behavior
evaluationCriterias.description: Conduct and interaction with colleagues, supervisors, customers, and partners.

evaluationCriterias.title: Final Statement
evaluationCriterias.description: Final overall remark and summary of the evaluation.
